skills.name: daily-plan
skills.description: Produce today's working plan as a bulletin widget artifact: top priorities, scheduled blocks, and carry-overs. Run by the run-routine dispatcher on a morning schedule; not meant for interactive invocation.

widget.artifact: Today's plan: top 3 priorities, time blocks, and carry-overs

skills.name: repo-pulse
skills.description: Summarize the recent pulse of a set of GitHub repositories — open PRs awaiting review, freshly opened issues, CI status — as a bulletin widget artifact. Run by the run-routine dispatcher; not meant for interactive invocation.

widget.artifact: Open PRs awaiting review, new issues, and CI status per repo
